overall.description: A third-person perspective walkthrough of a rainy cyberpunk city street at night, featuring neon-lit market stalls, holographic advertisements, and dense urban architecture. The character walks through narrow alleys and transitions to an elevated walkway overlooking the city, with persistent rain and atmospheric haze throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk market street with wooden food vendors

events.description: character begins walking forward through the market street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow market street, observing food stalls on the right side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking ahead in the same direction
vendor standing beside a food stall with neon lighting

entered.detail: wooden market stall with roof and warm interior lighting
bright red neon signage on building facades
large overhead billboard with AVANTE text visible in the distance
tall street lamp casting yellow light through the rain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a narrow cyberpunk market street. The camera follows a character walking past wooden food stalls illuminated by warm light on the right, with red neon signs glowing on the left. An AVANTE billboard is visible in the distance, and a pedestrian in a yellow jacket walks ahead. The atmosphere is hazy with rain, and the street is relatively sparse with people.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with trash accumulation and neon signage

events.description: passing large piles of blue trash bags accumulated on the right sidewalk
passing under brighter neon signs causing a shift in ambient lighting color

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street, navigating around pedestrians and observing the urban decay

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red coat walking ahead in the same direction
person standing near the blue trash bags on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large piles of blue garbage bags stacked on the sidewalk
glowing green medical cross sign on building facade
tall vertical advertising billboard with holographic display

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the commercial district, passing piles of blue trash bags on the right. The AVANTE billboard grows larger ahead, while neon medical crosses and vertical billboards appear on the buildings. The crowd density increases slightly, with a pedestrian in a red coat walking ahead. The lighting shifts as the character passes under brighter neon installations.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon corridor with overhead holographic advertisements

events.description: entering area with dense overhead neon signs and vertical billboards
slight turn to the right to avoid oncoming pedestrian with umbrella

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dense neon corridor, dodging pedestrians while looking up at the signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking toward the camera
person standing under a shop awning on the right

entered.detail: large neon sign with Japanese text HOテル hanging overhead
massive vertical holographic billboard displaying advertisements
teal-colored neon sign with SAMURAI text
red neon OPEN sign on shop front

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dense neon corridor dominated by the HOテル sign and massive vertical billboards overhead. The SAMURAI neon sign glows teal on the left, while the character navigates around a pedestrian with an umbrella. The environment is heavily enclosed by buildings covered in holographic advertisements, creating a canyon-like effect with reflective wet concrete underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking highway and city

events.description: ascending to elevated walkway with glass barriers overlooking the city below
ambient lighting shifts to dominant teal from surrounding structure lights
turning left to follow the curve of the elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated pathway, looking down at the highway below through glass barriers

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a concrete bench facing the city view
pedestrian with wide-brimmed hat walking ahead on the walkway

entered.detail: transparent glass safety barrier along the edge of the elevated walkway
view of multi-lane highway with moving vehicles below the walkway
large structural beams illuminated with teal neon lighting
concrete bench with person sitting overlooking the view

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to an elevated walkway with glass barriers overlooking a busy highway below. The lighting shifts to a dominant teal from the structural beams, contrasting with the warm city lights in the distance. A person sits on a bench on the left enjoying the view, while the character follows the curve of the walkway. The open sides expose the scene to the rainy weather while providing a panoramic view of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy cyberpunk market street that gradually transitions into a more densely lit commercial district. It begins by following a character past warm, wooden food stalls and glowing red neon signs, moving through a hazy atmosphere toward a distant AVANTE billboard. As the character advances, the scene shifts past piles of blue trash bags on the right while the surrounding architecture becomes more crowded with vertical billboards and neon medical crosses. The lighting intensifies as the camera passes under brighter neon installations, and the sparse street opens up to a slightly denser crowd, including a pedestrian in a red coat, as the AVANTE billboard looms larger ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-drenched urban corridor into an expansive elevated vista of the cyberpunk city. It begins by navigating a dense canyon of buildings where massive vertical billboards and a teal SAMURAI sign cast vibrant reflections onto the wet concrete. As the character moves past pedestrians with umbrellas, the enclosed environment of holographic advertisements gradually gives way to a transition upward. The scene then opens onto an elevated walkway with glass barriers, where the lighting shifts to a dominant teal glow from structural beams. Finally, the camera follows the curve of the path past a lone figure on a bench, revealing a panoramic view of a rainy highway and the distant, shimmering city lights.
